_readme: Copy this file to strategy_overrides.json and edit freely. It overrides the built-in catalog in app/strategies.py without touching code. Restart the server after editing. Delete an entry to fall back to the built-in wording.

execution.goal: Verify whether students can mentally execute the program.

trace_variables.pattern:
Consider this code from <file>:
<short snippet, elide irrelevant lines with ...>
After <concrete step>, which statements about <variable> are correct?
trace_variables.directive: Ask the taker to trace concrete variable values through an execution of the code in the evidence.
